channel.title: Home on bl7ck0ut
channel.description: Recent content in Home on bl7ck0ut

item.title: About
item.description:
I’ve finally crossed the line from ‘get me out of here’ to ‘wait, let me look at those registers. I started out in incident response before falling down the malware analysis rabbit hole.

Now, I’m pretty much interested in the malware analysis & reverse engineering side of things. I have built this site to document my journey of learning more about reverse engineering, analyzing malware threats & maybe malware development.
